Adam Warlock.adjustment: Reduce Karmic Revival Ultimate energy cost from 5000 to 4700. Karmic Revival now provides Bonus Health equal to 70% of Maximum Health. Cosmic Cluster now reduces Avatar Life Stream charge times by 0.3s per hit.
Increase soul flight speed from 6m/s to 12m/s. Reduce Karmic Revival Ultimate energy cost from 4700 to 4500 and increase ally detection radius from 30m to 35m.

Angela.adjustment: Increase Axes of Ichors Bonus Health from 30 per enemy hit to 40 and allies from 15 to 20 after Divine Judgement.
Increase Movement Speed of Assassin's Charge accelerated dash state from 16m/s to 18m/s. Increase Heven's Retribution Ultimate spear Health from 600 to 800.
Reduce Shielded Stance Shield Value from 350 to 300.
Reduce Seraphic Soar attack charge-to-Spear conversion from 45% to 35%. Increase bonus damage at full charge from 15 to 20. Increase Shielded Stance damage-to-charge conversion from 25% to 35%.

Black Panther.adjustment: Increase Spirit Rend cooldown from 8s to 10s.
Reduce Bonus Health gained when striking Vibranium Marked enemies with Spirit Rend from 30 to 25. Reduce base health from 300 to 275.
Hawkeye unlocks Moonlit Slash ability through Team-Up with Cloak & Dagger.
Increase Spear Toss Damage from 45 to 50. Gain 50% Damage Reduction during Bast's Descent Ultimate startup animation.
Spinning Kick now omnidirectional - no longer bound to flat plane. Increase Spinning Kick Damage from 70 to 75. Reduce Spear Toss recovery time from 6s to 5s.

Blade.adjustment: Increase Lifesteal gained during Bloodline Awakening from 60% to 65%. Reduce self-healing reduction from 40% to 35%.
Increase Daywalker Dash secondary attack range from 4.5m to 6.5m. Increase slash speed attack duration from 0.7s to 1s. Landing all four hits of Whirlwind Slash grants 1 slash speed stack.
Increase Ancestral Sword single-hit Damage from 24 to 26 and Whirlwind Slash single-hit Damage from 15 to 16. Reduce Bloodline Awakening Reduced Healing from 35% to 25%.

When wielding Hunter's Shotgun, Daywalker Dash applies 40% slow for 1.5s. When wielding Ancestral Sword, removes slow and applies 8% Healing Reduction per strike (32% total). Reduce pellets fired per round from 12 to 11.

Increase Hunter's Shotgun Projectile Speed from 150m/s to 180m/s. Increase Ancestral Sword Attack Range from 4.5m to 5m. Excess lifesteal grants Bonus Health (max 75). Increase Lifesteal Ratio from 65% to 70%.

Captain America.adjustment: Remove Team-Up Anchor bonus 5% Damage boost.
Freedom Charge Ultimate now grants allies 30% boost to Ultimate Energy charge efficiency.
Reduce Vibranium Energy Saw cooldown from 8s to 6s.

Increase melee attack damage from 40 to 45. Last four ranged Sentinel Strike shield throws won't be interrupted by Leading Dash when set to toggle. Reduce Freedom Charge Ultimate energy charge for allies from 30% to 20%.

Cloak & Dagger.adjustment: Increase Eternal Bond Ultimate energy cost from 4000 to 4300.
Increase Eternal Bond Ultimate energy cost from 4300 to 4500.
Reduce Dagger Storm Healing from 55/s to 45/s. When Spell Field is created, allies in range get One-Time Healing of 60.

Doctor Strange.adjustment: Increase Daggers of Denak projectile charges from 8 to 10. Reduce Cloak of Levitation cooldown from 15s to 12s.
Reduce Maelstrom of Madness cooldown from 8s to 6s. Reduce base health from 600 to 575.
Increase Maelstrom of Madness conversion ratio of Dark Magic to damage from 1.2 to 1.3. Cloak of Levitation now interrupts on re-cast.
Reduce Shield of the Seraphim Shield Value recovery speed from 70/s to 60/s.
Reduce Shield of the Seraphim shield value from 800 to 700. Global Ultimate Ability charge rate reduced 20%.

Deadpool.adjustment: As Team-Up Anchor: Vanguard +50 Health, Duelist +5% Damage, Strategist +5% Healing.
Duelist variant: Increase Healing Amount gained when releasing Pop Quiz Ultimate from 30 to 35 and from 60 to 70.
All variants: Increase Ultimate Ability cooldown from 45s to 60s.
Slightly reduced mobility - limited burst potential. Bunny Bounce, Bunny Hop, and Healing Hop now have 0.5s cooldown after successful refresh.

Daredevil.adjustment: Daredevil gains Bestial Hunt Team-Up Anchor bonus: +25 max health and +5% damage boost.
Reduce Devil's Chain high damage range Damage from 80 to 75. Reduce Devil's Throw single Projectile Damage from 32.5 to 30. Reduce Fury gained from Devil's Latch when grappling from 2 to 1.
Reduce Devil's Chain end Damage from 35 to 25. Reduce Devil's Chain Bonus Max Health from 125 to 100. Reduce Sonic Pursuit Damage Reduction from 20% to 10%.

Elsa Bloodstone.adjustment: Reduces Glartrox health from 500 to 400. Reduces Dash Duration from 6s to 3.5s. Adjusts enemy grab hitbox dimensions.
Reduce Instinct lost upon defeat from 1 stack to 2 stacks. Reduce Ruthless Pursuit and Helix Advance Bonus Health from 40 to 30.
Reduced base health from 275 to 250. Slightly reduced durability.

Emma Frost.adjustment: Reduce Telepathic Pulse Damage at 99 energy from 120/s to 110/s and from 150/s to 140/s at 100 energy. Reduce Diamond Form Damage Reduction from 30% to 25%. Reduce Psionic Seduction Ultimate energy cost from 3700 to 3400.
Increase Diamond Form cooldown from 15s to 18s. Reduce Telepathic Pulse energy gained when hitting shields from 10/s to 5/s.
Increase Base Health from 550 to 600. Remove Team-Up Anchor 100 Bonus Health.
Increase Energy gained: Hero hits from 10/s to 12/s, Sentience hits from 15/s to 18/s, Shield hits from 5/s to 6/s.
Reduce Diamond Form cooldown from 18s to 15s. Increase Mind's Aegis recovery rate from 70/s to 80/s.
Reduce Diamond Form Damage Reduction from 25% to 20%. Adjust Psionic Seduction Ultimate Damage Falloff. Gain 20% Damage Reduction during ability.

Gambit.adjustment: As Team-Up Anchor with Magneto: +5% healing effects boost.
Increase Ragin' Royal Flush Ultimate energy cost from 4300 to 4500.
Reduce Big Easy Impact Healing from 25 to 15 per explosion. Reduce Ragin' Royal Flush Healing from 75/s to 55/s. Bridge Boost bounces on single target max to 2.
Reduce base health from 275 to 250. Breaking Spades now grants 10% Damage Boost (was 15%).
Reduce Ragin' Royal Flush Ultimate effect duration from 10s to 8s.
Reduce Ultimate Ability Charge Acceleration to allies from 30% to 20%. Reduce Movement Boost from 50% to 40%. Increase additional single-target explosive damage from 20% to 25%.

Groot.adjustment: Increase Vine Strike range from 20m to 22m. Increase Flora Colossus effect range radius from 20m to 24m.
Ironwood Wall gains Unstoppable status when within 15m.

Hawkeye.adjustment: Increase Archer's Focus maximum Bonus Damage from 75 to 90.
Reduce Piercing Arrow Base Damage from 34 to 28. Reduce fully charged arrow Base Damage from 85 to 70. When boosted by Archer's Focus, reduce damage from 175 to 160.
Reduce Base Health from 275 to 250. Survivability decreased.

Hela.adjustment: Reduce Astral Flock start-up cast time. After casting, Hela gains 25 Bonus Health.
Damage falloff of Nightsword Thorn: at 30m, maximum falloff drops to 70% of base. Beyond 25m, two critical hits will not KO a 250 HP target.

Human Torch.adjustment: Reduce Fire Cluster Damage per projectile from 6 to 5.5. Reduce Supernova activation shockwave Damage from 80 to 75. Reduce Fire Tornadoes DoT from 120/s to 110/s. Add Team-Up Anchor bonus 5% Damage boost.
Reduce Flame Field Damage Over Time from 25/s to 20/s. Reduce Pyro-Prison Damage Over Time from 50/s to 40/s.
Reduce Fire Cluster hit Damage per projectile from 5.5 to 5. Add 0.5s delay before ammo begins to replenish. During Plasma Body, reduce movement speed from 900 to 850.

Slightly reduce projectile spread. Increase single-cast projectile Damage from 5 to 5.5. Adjust maximum falloff from 60% at 30m to 60% at 20m. Reduce charge speed from 3s to 2.5s. Increase hit Damage from 40 to 45.
Instantly recover all Fire Cluster ammo energy after not using Blaze Cluster for 1s. More uptime, more burn.

Hulk.adjustment: Gamma Burst gains new effect: Each direct hit reduces Indestructible Guard cooldown by 1s.

Reduce Hero Hulk Incredible Leap minimum charge time from 0.5s to 0.4s. Maximum charge time from 2s to 1.7s. In Hero form, reduce Gamma Burst cooldown from 8s to 6s and increase projectile Damage from 70 to 75. In Monster form, immune to launch and knockback.
Increase Indestructible Guard absorbed damage to ultimate charge conversion from 100% to 130%. Gamma Burst now has two charges with 6s cooldown each. Reduce single hit damage from 75 to 65.

Invisible Woman.adjustment: Increase Orb Projection hit damage from 25 to 30. Projectile maximum range from 30m to 35m. Projectile speed from 120m/s to 150m/s. Increase Force Physics length from 30m to 35m. Guardian Shield deployment on recall if not present.
Increase Slow effect to enemies passing through Guardian Shield from 30% to 35%. Increase Invisible Boundary Ultimate healing from 165 to 180/s. New Effect: Slows enemies within range by 20%.

Increase Orb Projection hit damage from 25 to 30. Projectile max range from 30m to 35m, speed from 120m/s to 150m/s. Increase Force Physics length from 30m to 35m. Guardian Shield new effect: deploy shield in front if none present.
Increase Orb Projection cooldown from 8s to 10s.
Reduce Guardian Shield value from 250 to 200. Reduce shield restoration rate from 42/s to 34/s. Reduce Guardian Shield healing to Invisible Woman from 50/s to 25/s.
Increase Force Physics cooldown from 8s to 10s.
Reduce Guardian Shield healing from 25/s to 15/s. Increase healing during Covert Advance from 20/s to 30/s.

Iron Fist.adjustment: Increase Jeet Kune Do 5th strike damage from 50 to 55. Increase Yat Jee Chung Kuen percentage damage from 2.1% to 2.7%. Adjust Harmony Recovery Bonus Health decay start from 1s to 2s. Increase K'un-Lun Kick first strike damage from 30 to 35.
Lower fixed damage of Yat Jee Chung Kuen from 9 to 8, but increase percentage damage from 2.7% to 3.1% of enemy Max Health.

Increase Jeet Kune Do 5th strike damage from 50 to 55. Increase Yat Jee Chung Kuen percentage damage from 2.1% to 2.7% of enemy Max Health. Adjust Harmony Recovery Bonus Health decay start from 1s to 2s. Increase K'un-Lun Kick first strike damage from 30 to 35.

Iron Man.adjustment: Reduce first two Repulsor Blast hits from 40 to 35 and from 50 to 45 in Armor Overdrive. Increase Invincible Pulse Cannon Ultimate energy cost from 2800 to 3400.
Armor Overdrive: Each KO while active extends duration by 2s. Reduce Armor Overdrive startup from 1.8s to 1.3s.

Jeff the Land Shark.adjustment: It's Jeff Ultimate now leaves an 8m radius Healing Pool at activation point that heals allies for 100/s. Lasts for 8s.
Reduce crit damage reduction from Oblivious Cuteness passive from 70% to 50%.

Loki.adjustment: Increase Loki energy cost of God of Mischief Ultimate from 4000 to 4300.
Reduce Mystical Missile damage from Loki and illusions to enemies from 30 to 25.
Reduce illusion damage and healing ratio from 100% to 80%. Reduce God of Mischief Ultimate shapeshift period from 15s to 12s.
Increase base health from 250 to 275. Increase damage and healing ratio of illusions from 80% to 90%.
Reduce Dagger Storm Healing from 55/s to 45/s. Adjust Mystical Missile damage falloff at 3m from 50% to 80%. New effect: heals directly hit allies for extra 10 Health.
Increase base health from 250 to 275. Adjust Mystical Missile damage falloff from 50% to 80% at 3m. New Effect: Now heals directly hit allies for 10 Health.

Luna Snow.adjustment: Reduce Fate of Both Worlds Ultimate duration from 12s to 10s.
Idol Aura new effect: Reduce Ice Arts cooldown by 2s whenever hero with Idol Aura takes part in KO.

Magik.adjustment: Remove Team-Up Anchor bonus 15% Damage boost. Reduce Magik Slash charge time from 1.8s to 1.2s. Soulsword damage from 65 to 75. Eldritch Whirl damage from 45 to 50. Demon's Rage damage from 18 to 20. Melee Normal Attack from 30 to 40.
Increase Umbral Incursion hitbox radius from 0.45m to 1m in both forms. Reduce normal form Magik Slash max charged damage ratio from 2 to 1.8. Reduce Darkchild Ultimate startup from 1s to 0.8s.

Magneto.adjustment: Reduce Metal Bulwark and Iron Bulwark Shield Value from 300 to 250.
Separate cooldowns of Metal Bulwark and Iron Bulwark. Reduce shield value from 250 to 200.
Increase Metal Bulwark cooldown from 12s to 15s. Reduce Iron Bulwark cooldown from 12s to 10s. Increase Meteor M Ultimate projectile speed from 30m/s to 45m/s.

Mantis.adjustment: Healing Flower new effect: heals allies by 2.5%/s. Reduce base healing from 20/s to 12.5/s. Increase Soul Resurgence Ultimate energy cost from 3700 to 4300. Increase Bonus Max Health from 100 to 150.

Increase healing by 10% with Team-Up Anchor. Reduce Healing Flower Healing Over Time from 12.5/s to 10/s. Reduce Life Energy Blast charges from 20 to 15. Increase Soul Resurgence excess healing to Bonus Health conversion from 0.7 to 1.
Movement Boost from Nature's Favor decays to 0 over 2s after being hit instead of instantly.

Mister Fantastic.adjustment: Reduce Inflated state Bonus Health from 400 to 350.
After successfully pulling with Distended Grip, target is afflicted with 1-second immobilize effect.
Reflexive Rubber can now be used during Inflated state after reaching 100 Elasticity. Remove 350 Bonus Health on entering Inflated; gain 350 Maximum Health and one-time heal of 350.

Moon Knight.adjustment: Moon Blade now holds up to 2 charges, each taking 6s to recharge.
Reduce Bonus Max Health provided by Moon Blade from 100 to 75.

Namor.adjustment: Increase Trident of Neptune Projectile Damage from 70 to 75 and Projectile Speed from 120m/s to 150m/s. Increase Wrath of the Seven Seas Projectile Speed from 120m/s to 150m/s.
Reduce Aquatic Dominion time for single charge from 12s to 10s. Increase default Monstro Spawn Health from 100 to 125 and Damage from 17 to 18. Increase Enhanced Monstro Spawn Damage from 11 to 12.

Peni Parker.adjustment: Spider-Drone now slows hit enemies by 8% for 2s, stacking up to 40%. Reduce Spider-Drone release interval during Ultimate from 0.7s to 0.5s.
Allies in Cyber-Webs receive same Healing Over Time and Movement Boost as Peni. Movement Boost 25%, Healing 15/s. Ally excess healing converts to Bonus Health up to 25.

Phoenix.adjustment: Melee attacks no longer stack Sparks. Primary Weapon ammo no longer replenishes during Dark Ascent. Add 1s cooldown to Dark Ascent.
Increase Endsong Inferno Ultimate Phoenix summon Health from 400 to 500.
Adjust Cosmic Flames maximum falloff at 30m from 60% to 75%.

Psylocke.adjustment: Decrease Wing Shurikens retrieve damage per hit from 12 to 8.
Reduce self-slow rate during Dance of the Butterfly Ultimate from 30% to 15%. Increase each strike damage from 150 to 170.
Increase Dance of the Butterfly Ultimate energy cost from 2800 to 3400.
Increase Psionic Crossbow cooldown reduction on hit from 0.25s to 0.3s. Increase Wing Shurikens Damage from 8 to 9.
Psionic Crossbow Damage Falloff: adjust maximum from 60% to 70% at 30m. Reduce Dance of the Butterfly single-hit Damage from 170 to 160.
Increase Psionic Crossbow cooldown reduction on hit from 0.25s to 0.3s. Increase Wing Shurikens Damage on throw and return from 8 to 9.

Rocket Raccoon.adjustment: Increase Damage Boost from C.Y.A. Ultimate from 25% to 40%.
Reduce B.R.B. cooldown from 45s to 40s. Increase Repair Mode max count from 5 to 7 and projectile speed from 60m/s to 80m/s. Increase Bombard Mode Projectile Speed from 150m/s to 180m/s.
Increase C.Y.A. Ultimate energy cost from 4000 to 4300.
Reduce Movement Speed during Wild Crawl from 10m/s to 8m/s.

Rogue.adjustment: Increase Defensive Stance absorbed Damage energy conversion from 0.27 to 0.35. Reduce Fatal Attraction cooldown from 17s to 14s.

Scarlet Witch.adjustment: Reduce max slow rate during Reality Erasure Ultimate charge from 35% to 25%. Increase Damage from 750 to 850.
Can now be healed by teammates during Mystic Projection. Increase Reality Erasure damage to 9999. New Effect: Pulls in nearby enemies (within 15m radius) during cast charge at max speed 2.4m/s.
Chaos Control has Damage Falloff starting at 10m, dropping to 90% at max range. Increase base damage from 80/s to 85/s. Increase Chthonian Burst charge by Chaos Control from 0.1 to 0.15.

Spider-Man.adjustment: Increase 'Get Over Here!' kick Damage from 50 to 55. Increase Spider-Power midair Damage from 50 to 55. Increase Amazing Combo Damage from 55 to 60.
Increase Spectacular Spin Ultimate Damage per second from 150 to 170.
Reduce Web-Cluster energize time from 2.5s to 2s. Increase Amazing Combo Damage from 60 to 70.

Squirrel Girl.adjustment: Reduce Burst Acorn damage from 110 to 100. Increase Squirrel Blockade hit damage from 35 to 50. Increase Mammal Bond cooldown from 10s to 15s.
Increase Burst Acorn Damage from 100 to 110.

Star-Lord.adjustment: Gain 25 Bonus Health when using Stellar Shift (max 25), lasts 3s before decaying.
Reduce Galactic Legend Ultimate energy cost from 3400 to 3100.

Storm.adjustment: Increase Weather Control - Thunder Damage Boost to allies from 10% to 12%. Increase Goddess Boost - Thunder Damage Boost from 12% to 15%.

Weather Control - Tornado new effect: Wind Blade and Bolt Rush grant Storm Bonus Health (25% conversion, max 75). Thunder new effect: Wind Blade hits reduce Bolt Rush cooldown by 0.5s. Increase Bolt Rush range from 1m to 1.5m. Thunder & Lightning: ally buffs decay over 2s instead of vanishing. Reduce Damage Boost from 12% to 8%.

The Punisher.adjustment: Reduce Culling Turret Projectile Damage from 12 to 10. Decrease Spell Field Damage from 12 to 10. Increase Final Judgement Ultimate energy cost from 3400 to 3700.
Increase base health from 275 to 300. Adjust Adjudication max falloff at 40m from 70% to 85%. Increase pellets per Deliverance round from 14 to 16.
Increase Adjudication Damage from 19 to 20. Reduce Final Judgement Ultimate energy cost from 3700 to 3400.

The Thing.adjustment: Add Battle Blitz ability: leap toward enemies, gain 25% Damage Reduction. Leap targeting distance 20m. Stone Haymaker new effect: knock down hit flying enemies.

Embattled Leap: Remove Damage Reduction from single target. Grant 20% to all allies within 5m. Reduce self Damage Reduction from 25% to 20%. Battle Blitz: Remove self Damage Reduction. Apply 20% Vulnerability to enemies within 5m. Reduce Stone Haymaker base Damage from 90 to 55. New effect: Bonus Damage 8% of enemy max Health. Gain Bonus Health equal to damage (up to 100).
Increase Stone Haymaker Bonus Damage from 8% to 10% of enemies' max Health. Increase lingering anti-mobility field duration after Yancy Street Charge from 3s to 5s.

Thor.adjustment: Gain fixed 1 Thorforce upon exiting Awakening Rune state. Lightning Realm new effect: enemies leaving boundary are Grounded for 2s.
Increase Ultimate Ability Movement Speed from 600 to 700. After Ultimate lands, Stun surrounding enemies for 1s.
During Storm Surge, freely adjust movement direction while dashing. Move in any direction.
Hammer Throw new effect: hits grant 50 Bonus Health (only once per throw). Reduce Bonus Health from Storm Surge from 75 to 50.

Ultron.adjustment: Reduce Dynamic Flight acceleration effect time from 8s to 6s. Reduce Imperative: Firewall Bonus Health to self from 75 to 65, to allies from 55 to 50.
Rage of Ultron Ultimate now deals 125% damage to Bonus Health.
Reduce Imperative: Patch healing from 35 to 30 and healing bonus to followed ally from 10 to 5. Increase Rage of Ultron Ultimate energy cost from 3400 to 3700.

Imperative: Patch can deploy up to 2 drones. Imperative: Firewall requires target with Imperative: Patch. After use, gain 65 Bonus Health. Target and allies get 50 Bonus Health, selected ally gets 20% Movement Speed and 10% Damage boost. Increase Rage of Ultron energy cost from 3700 to 4000.

Venom.adjustment: Increase Cellular Corrosion enemy slow effect from 15% to 25%.
Feast of the Abyss Ultimate now applies 30% Healing Reduction to enemies hit for 4 seconds.
Increase base health from 650 to 675. Increase Feast of the Abyss Damage-to-Bonus-Health conversion from 1 to 1.3.

White Fox.adjustment: Upon respawn or exiting Kumiho Unleashed, gain full stacks of Spirit Tail. Spectral Surge provides 50 healing. Spirit Sanctuary reduces One-Time Healing from 70 to 50. Provides 20/s Healing Over Time to allies. Blessed by the Nine has 2s cooldown during Ultimate.

Winter Soldier.adjustment: Adjust Roterstern Damage Falloff maximum at 40m from 60% to 70%.
Trooper's Fist second strike now applies 1s debuff preventing enemies from using mobility abilities.
Reduce Roterstern Spell Field Damage on hit from 65 to 55. Less splash, more direct damage.

Wolverine.adjustment: Increase Berserk Claw Strike Base Damage from 6 to 8. Reduce Percentage Damage per attack at max Rage from 4.5% to 3.5%. Increase Regenerative Healing Factor cooldown from 90s to 105s. Increase cooldown reduction from 10s to 12s when participating in KOs. Reduce Lifesteal from Phoenix Warrior Team-Up from 33% to 25%.
Increase Last Stand Ultimate energy cost from 2800 to 3400. Lifesteal from Primal Flame no longer contributes to Ultimate energy.
Increase Savage Claw Percentage Damage from 0.045% to 0.057% per Rage point. Increase Vicious Rampage Percentage Damage from 0.045% to 0.057%. Reduce Feral Leap cooldown from 15s to 12s.
Reduce Last Stand Ultimate energy cost from 3400 to 2800.
